seo.title: Un Azhagukku Song Lyrics Aalavandhan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Azhagukku, the characters express their deep admiration and love for each other through poetic lyrics that celebrate beauty and connection. The song plays a pivotal role in Aalavandhan, enhancing the emotional landscape of the film. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery, it evokes feelings of romance and tenderness. The collaboration between Shankar Mahadevan and Sujatha Mohan brings a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Azhagukku from Aalavandhan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and admiration. With the soulful voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Sujatha Mohan, this song creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth to the emotional experience, making it a must-listen for romantic occasions.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, your beauty is a mother's duty, knowledge is a Tamil duty. Your beauty is a mother's duty, knowledge is a Tamil duty.
Oh, your fame is a sky's duty, the earth's duty is for the community. Your qualities are gold's duty, a finger's duty is for the little ones.
Your essence is a flower's duty, a mountain's duty is for the heart. A voice's duty is for the cuckoo, I am a duty for the little ones....
Life... life... my world is your duty, my bond... my bond... your support is my duty. Life..... life.....
Your gaze is a work's duty, your work is a flower's duty. Your gaze is a work's duty, your work is a flower's duty.
Your smile is a music's duty, a laugh's duty is for her. Your beauty is a statue's duty, your existence is a river's duty.
Oh, your beauty is a mother's duty, knowledge is a Tamil duty. Your fame is a sky's duty, the earth's duty is for the community.
Your essence is a flower's duty, a mountain's duty is for the heart. You are a duty for my coolness, I am a duty for the little ones.
Life.... life.... my world is your duty, my bond.... my bond... your support is my duty. Life... life...
For my friendship... you are my duty... For your friendship... I am your duty... For my friendship... you are my duty... For your friendship... I am your duty...
You are a duty for my dreams, I am a duty for your hunger, for my arrival... you are my duty... For your words... I am your duty...
Oh, your beauty is a mother's duty, knowledge is a Tamil duty. Your fame is a sky's duty, the earth's duty is for the community.
Your essence is a flower's duty, a mountain's duty is for the heart. You are a duty for my coolness, I am a duty for the little ones.
Life.... life.... my world is your duty, my bond.... my bond... your support is my duty. Life..... life...
